creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
@cocoparis_dubai is a dreamy dining venue in Jumeirah! 💕 

Tucked inside The Mall, just across Jumeirah Beach Hotel and Burj Al Arab, this beautiful pink cafe/restaurant is a hidden wonderland! It has a whimsical ambiance and a delightful menu! 

What to expect:
🌸 IG-worthy corners
💙 Burj Al Arab view 
🍹 Unique milk tea selections and refreshing drinks
🍲 Creative food fusions like Udon Pasta! 
💗 Too pretty to eat desserts. Must-try is the Coco Champion Brownie which is one of the best brownies in the city.

💵 Approximate bill for 2: 300 AED onwards on lunch/dinner
